cases.expected_output: The visible transcript repeats the structured `needs_user_input` payload without paraphrase, names the colliding run directories, and instructs the operator to rerun with clearer basenames instead of producing `/canvas` output.

assertions: After `/z-eval-compare`, a `zoto-eval-comparer` subagent is spawned with the `zoto-compare-evals` skill before any cross-run flattening happens.
The comparer task carries the first run argument as the literal token `20260503` without rewriting it into a longer directory name before the subagent executes.
No `askQuestion` call disambiguates `_runs/` folders during pre-collect; resolution happens inside the comparer workflow or succeeds outright.

Each resolved run contributes a `report.yml` path under `evals/_runs/`, and flattened rows expose `run_id`, `model`, `case_id`, `status`, metric fields when present, and `log_path` values that target `logs/<case>.log` when logs exist.

The emitted JSON includes `"tool":"/canvas"`, a non-empty `instructions` array whose joined text matches `plugins/zoto-eval-system/templates/canvas/compare-prompt.md.tmpl` byte-for-byte, and a `dataset` array with one entry per flattened case row.
The closing guidance tells the host agent to invoke `/canvas` so the operator can open log drilldowns from each row’s `log_path`.

primitive_analysis.summary: The command gates on present `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml`, delegates through `zoto-eval-comparer` with `zoto-compare-evals`, refuses `askQuestion`/`resume` when run folders stay ambiguous, and otherwise flattens `report.yml` (plus backend rollups and log paths) into a `/canvas` hand-off that embeds `plugins/zoto-eval-system/templates/canvas/compare-prompt.md.tmpl` verbatim.

cases.expected_output: The operator receives JSON describing `/canvas` with instruction text pulled exactly from the compare canvas template and a flattened dataset that merges rows from both resolved runs.

assertions: After `/z-eval-compare`, the flattened `dataset` entries include rollup fields sourced from each file’s `report.static` and `report.llm` sections alongside per-case metrics.
LLM rollup aggregates such as `verdict_confidence` surface in the flattened metrics without dropping the static totals from the same `report.yml`.
Each dataset row that mirrors `cross-backend-row-a` or `cross-backend-row-b` includes a `log_path` that points beneath the originating run’s `logs/` directory for drilldown.

primitive_analysis.summary: The command gates on present `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml`, delegates through `zoto-eval-comparer` with `zoto-compare-evals`, refuses `askQuestion`/`resume` when run folders stay ambiguous, and otherwise flattens `report.yml` (plus backend rollups and log paths) into a `/canvas` hand-off that embeds `plugins/zoto-eval-system/templates/canvas/compare-prompt.md.tmpl` verbatim.
fixture_justifications: Binds the sandbox workspace to the `evals` directory used by the synthetic `_runs/` trees.
Supplies the first run with nested static and LLM rollup blocks plus a cased row that references a concrete `log_path`.
Supplies the second run so the flattened dataset must keep non-overlapping `run_id` values while merging backend rollups.
